card.title: Liraglutide
card.description: This compounded formulation featuring Liraglutide (a GLP-1 receptor agonist) is designed to support weight management and metabolic health. Liraglutide helps regulate appetite, balance blood sugar levels, and promote fat metabolism, contributing to a sustainable approach to weight loss.
card.description2: For $299/mo, our comprehensive program includes virtual provider visits, personalized health coaching, lab access, and continuous support.
card.finePrint: Our drugs may include compounded products that have not been approved by the FDA. The FDA does not verify the safety or effectiveness of compounded dr...
